title: Lindsey Graham Championed Israel, Even as Wars Eroded American Support
summary_full: The Republican senator from South Carolina had an intense interest in the Middle East, and was a staunch supporter of U.S. strikes on Iran.
summary_public: The Republican senator from South Carolina had an intense interest in the Middle East, and was a staunch supporter of U.S. strikes on Iran.
